No listing fees. No subscriptions. Trek Africa Guide earns only when a booking is completed.
Trek Africa Guide Suppliers
Commission Terms

Add your Africa travel service

Tours, safaris, lodges, restaurants, transfers, workshops, cultural hosts, and local experiences can join Trek Africa Guide with a transparent commission-only model.

Start onboarding

Commission model

Example: customer pays USD 1,000. At 18% commission, Trek Africa Guide records USD 180 commission and USD 820 supplier payout after the booking is fulfilled.

Rates can be global, supplier-specific, or product-specific. Every calculation is stored in the booking audit log.

Create supplier account

Sign in

How approval works

Verify email, submit business details, add payout information, upload insurance, then wait for Trek Africa Guide admin approval before products can go live.

Supplier onboarding

Admin supplier controls

Approve suppliers, override commission, and generate monthly payout batches from completed paid bookings.

SupplierStatusCommission overrideActions

Trek Africa Guide supplier platform. Commission-only, transparent, Africa-ready.
